title: Avatha Paiyan Lyrics Paradesi Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Yasin, Vandana Srinivasan
Song: Avatha Paiyan
Movie: Paradesi
Music: GV Prakash
Lyrics Vairamuthu

Other Songs Lyrics
1. Thannai Thaane
2. Avatha Paiyan
3. Or Mirugam -- in Tamil
4. Senneer Thaana -- in Tamil

Avatha paiyaa sevatha paiyaa
alichatiyam yenada
Kavuchi mela aasapatta
karachaan kunju naanada

Peratyil penja pera mazha pola
nenju kootula neranjiruka

kanjiyil karanja uppu kallu pola
kannu kootula olinjiruka

namma boomi varandurikku
un naaku eeram pattu
vazhka nenanjirukku

Venni thanni kaachava
un mela kaalu oothava
kaachu pona kaiyila
un kaanja moonji ketava

kottaan kuchyil mel thechi kulikavaiyadi
yen akku pakka makkaporu aagudhey
nee thalli nilladi
aaraadhadi thoongaadhadi ..

Koothu paaka pogalaam
kooda vaada vaariyaa
sollu pecha kekuren
konjam nellu choru thaariya

ellu potta eesal thaaren
unna tharuviya
naan mundhi potu moodi vachi pookala
nee mondhu paathiya
muthadaya muttaa paiya

Avatha ponney sevatha ponney
alichatiyam yenadi
iluthuvachi kalutharukka
elichavaayan naanadi

kaiytha arutha kannukutti pola
sithan pokkil naan alanjen
karuva chiriki selayil irukki
katti potu sirikiriye

un soolchi palichiriche
nellu sothu paanaikulla
poona vilundhiruchey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Avatha Paiyan'?

'Avatha Paiyan' explores themes of love and emotional connection, reflecting the struggles and joys of relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Paradesi'?

In Paradesi, the song is set against a backdrop of love and longing, highlighting the characters' emotional journeys.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Avatha Paiyan'?

The song features the talented voices of Vandhana Srinivasan and Yasin, with music composed by GV Prakashkumar.

When was 'Avatha Paiyan' released?

'Avatha Paiyan' was released on November 24, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Avatha Paiyan' from the movie Paradesi beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and yearning. It portrays the emotional struggles faced by the characters, making it a poignant addition to the film's narrative. With its romantic and melancholic tones, the song evokes a deep sense of nostalgia and longing. The collaboration between Vandhana Srinivasan and Yasin, along with GV Prakash's captivating music, creates a memorable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Avatha Paiyan from the movie Paradesi is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Vandhana Srinivasan and Yasin, paired with GV Prakash's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional depth and lyrical brilliance crafted by the legendary Vairamuthu in this unforgettable melody.
stanzaMeanings: The boy is a servant, what is this nonsense? I am a little one who is caught in the net of expectations.
In the world, the girl is like rain, and in the heart, there is a wound.
Like salt that has dissolved in porridge, my eyes are filled with tears.
Our land has come to you, my tongue is singing a song of life.
The girl is a treasure, what is this nonsense?
Will you pour water on me with your feet? If you go away, will you hear my cries?
In the corner of the house, I am waiting for you, my heart is restless, don't sleep, don't rest.
The boy is a servant, what is this nonsense?
We can go to watch the dance, come on, tell me, I am asking for a little rice.
If I give you the gift of my heart, will you give me yours? I will put my head down and offer it to you, will you look at me, my dear?
The girl is a treasure, what is this nonsense? I will write and make it dark, I am the one who is waiting.
Like a little girl with a hidden secret, I am smiling while hiding my pain.
Your words have become sweet, and the rice has fallen into the pot.
